use_cases: Navigate through paginated content such as search results or product listings
Switch between pages of data in data tables or grids
Browse through article archives or documentation pages
Access different sections of paginated user-generated content
Move between pages of e-commerce product catalogs
ai_summary: A minimalist pagination component from Ant Design that provides standard page navigation controls with page numbers, previous/next buttons, and page size options. Used for navigating through paginated content across various applications.
